title: One startup’s pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: crowdsource the chatbots
summary: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok — and up to 10 other models — all at the same time.

title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
summary: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

title: Eight Sleep raises $50M at $1.5B valuation
summary: Eight Sleep said it was free-cash-flow positive in 2025, and plans to use the new funding for new products, global expansions, and clinical validation.

title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
summary: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.

title: A suite of government hacking tools targeting iPhones is now being used by cybercriminals
summary: Security researchers say exploits used by governments to hack into iPhones have been found to be used by cybercriminals. They warned of an emerging market for "secondhand" exploits.

title: Alibaba’s Qwen tech lead steps down after major AI push

summary: TikTok experienced a similar outage just days after ByteDance divested the app's U.S. operations.

title: AI companies are spending millions to thwart this former tech exec’s congressional bid
